summary: Add cloud NAS sync event queue and machine API.

notes: Creates the durable nas_sync_events queue for employee.created events.
Enqueues one pending event when a new active employee with a name is inserted.
Publishes nas_sync_events through Supabase Realtime table changes for NAS worker wakeups.
Adds atomic claim, complete, and fail RPCs with hashed one-time claim tokens.
Adds /api/nas-sync/* JSON machine endpoints in serve_spa.py.
Requires Authorization: Bearer <NAS_SYNC_TOKEN> and validates it against NAS_SYNC_TOKEN_SHA256.
Returns only the event fields required by the NAS worker.
Issues short-lived Realtime JWTs for NAS sync subscriptions.

verification: Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.35.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.35.
known_warnings: The NAS_SYNC_TOKEN plaintext is not stored in git or cloud env; only NAS_SYNC_TOKEN_SHA256 is configured on the cloud host.
The NAS worker must receive the generated NAS_SYNC_TOKEN through the local secret handoff file before enabling NAS_SYNC_ENABLED=true.
